title: Monanthotaxis orophila
taxonomy: Monanthotaxis orophila belongs to the family Annonaceae. This plant is classified as a species within the genus Monanthotaxis. Monanthotaxis orophila is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Monanthotaxis orophila is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae and the clade Angiosperms. It is also classified as a member of the order Magnoliales.

intro: Monanthotaxis orophila, also known as the Matakala or Orophila, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Annonaceae family. Studies have shown that Monanthotaxis orophila possesses various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders.
